Defendant Laura De La Pena, Larry Freed Special Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS LAURA DE LA PENA AND LARRY FREED'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Frank S. Moore (292.6091) for defendants and moving parties; Mary Prater (407.6466) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona.
Ms. Prater provided courtesy copies of her opposition. The matter was discussed and the court took the matter under submission. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS LAURA DE LA PENA AND LARRY FREED'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Mary Prater (407.6466) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona; Frank Moore of the Law Offices of Frank Moore (292.6091) for defendants and moving parties.
Discussed and the court ruled as follows: continued to January 27, 2012. Opposition to be filed by January 20, 2012. If an opposition is not filed, the motion will be granted. A reply to be filed by January 24, 2012. Courtesy copies of these papers to be provided to department 302. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
